nasb.text: “Go and proclaim in the ears of Jerusalem, saying, ‘Thus says the Lord, “I remember concerning you the devotion of your youth, The love of your betrothals, Your following after Me in the wilderness, Through a land not sown.

esv.text: “Go and proclaim in the hearing of Jerusalem, Thus says the Lord, “I remember the devotion of your youth, your love as a bride, how you followed me in the wilderness, in a land not sown.

cnv.text: “你去在耶路撒冷人的耳中呼叫，說：‘耶和華這樣說： 你年輕時的恩愛， 新婚時的愛情， 你怎樣在曠野、 在未曾耕種之地跟從我， 我都記得。

ccb.text: “你去告诉耶路撒冷人， ‘耶和华说， 我记得你们年轻时对我充满热情， 爱我如新娘爱新郎， 跟随我穿越旷野， 穿越不毛之地。
